title: dracocephalum atlanticum
intro: Dracocephalum atlanticum, also known as Atlantic Dragon Head, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Its leaves and flowers are rich in essential oils and flavonoids, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dracocephalum atlanticum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its essential oil is often used in aromatherapy.
